ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Mobile, Accessories) */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product in the specified currency */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency type for the product price */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the product manufacturer */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock quantity of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale transaction */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the sale was made */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "paid" REAL /* Total amount paid by the customer */,
  "balance" REAL /* Outstanding balance for the transaction */,
  "total" REAL /* Total amount for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the purchase */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who processed the sale */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Amount of discount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount for the sale */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for multi-currency transactions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sale record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the sale record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sale was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or business address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Customer's gender */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer's company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL to the customer's company website */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* Primary phone number of the customer's company */,
  "company_email" TEXT /* Primary email address of the customer's company */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the customer record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the customer record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the customer record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated sale */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date when the invoice was issued */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the invoice payment */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the invoice */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invoice (e.g., Paid, Unpaid) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who received the invoice */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who issued the invoice */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the invoice */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the invoice */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the invoice was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "invoice_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated invoice */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., Credit Card, Bank Transfer) */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who made the payment */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the salesperson who processed the payment */,
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the currency used for the payment */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for multi-currency transactions */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the payment record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment was made */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the payment record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the payment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_salesperson_id FOREIGN KEY ("salesperson_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_invoice_id FOREIGN KEY ("invoice_id") REFERENCES invoices ("invoice_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_currency_id FOREIGN KEY ("currency_id") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salespersons" (
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salesperson */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the salesperson */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the salesperson */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the salesperson */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the salesperson */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the salesperson operates */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the salesperson */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the salesperson record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salesperson record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the salesperson record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the salesperson record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salesperson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salespersons_region FOREIGN KEY ("region") REFERENCES regions ("region_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salespersons_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES salespersons ("salesperson_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Manager responsible for the region */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the region record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the region record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Full name of the currency */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $, €, £) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the currency record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the currency record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the currency record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Sales, Finance) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the role record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the role record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the user record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the user record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales channel */,
  "channel_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales channel (e.g., Online, Retail) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the channel */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the sales channel record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales channel record was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the sales channel record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales channel record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_channel_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sale */,
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales channel used for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_mapping_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("channel_id") REFERENCES sales_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_channel_mapping_sale_id FOREIGN KEY ("sale_id") REFERENCES sales ("sale_id")
)
